ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "infectious" INTEGER /* Indicates if the disease is infectious */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the disease (e.g., viral, bacterial) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., 0-4 years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "case_number" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "distribution" REAL /* Distribution of cases (%) */,
  "rate_per_100k" REAL /* Rate per 100,000 people */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the case was reported */,
  "date_confirmed" TEXT /* Date when the case was confirmed */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient was hospitalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "rate_per_100k" REAL /* Rate of mortality per 100,000 people */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Primary cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinates of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_distribution" (
  "case_distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case distribution */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "case_number" INTEGER /* Number of cases */,
  "case_density" REAL /* Number of cases per square kilometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_distribution_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_distribution_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_distribution_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reported_cases" (
  "reported_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reported case */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the report */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person/entity reporting the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reported_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reported_cases_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_status" (
  "case_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case status */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., active, recovered, deceased) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the case status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_status_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification (e.g., email address, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User or system that generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
